headline: UPS adds temporary surge fee to US imports, exports
summary: Across seven UPS services, a $0.23 per-pound charge applies to shipments between the U.S. and most other countries until further notice.

raw.headline: UPS adds temporary surge fee to US imports, exports
raw.summary: Across seven UPS services, a $0.23 per-pound charge applies to shipments between the U.S. and most other countries until further notice.

headline: UPS, FedEx, DHL Set to Reimburse Customers as CBP Tariff Portal Goes Live
summary: The IEEPA refund portal puts the carriers at the center of repayment process, with the logistics firms expecting to pay customers back in 60 to 90 days.

raw.headline: UPS, FedEx, DHL Set to Reimburse Customers as CBP Tariff Portal Goes Live
raw.summary: The IEEPA refund portal puts the carriers at the center of repayment process, with the logistics firms expecting to pay customers back in 60 to 90 days.

headline: IBM’s logo over the years: A timeline of ambition
summary: IBM's striped logo is one of the world’s most iconic visual designs. Created in 1972 by Paul Rand, the “father of graphic design,” this simple yet powerful wordmark has outlasted 10 U.S. presidents and 13 bear markets, not to mention the company’s own evolution from a mainframe computing giant into ...
